overall.description: First-person horseback riding through a dark grassy field at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The rider follows a dirt path and encounters another torch-bearing traveler before turning off into a field with standing stones. The footage appears to be from a video game with realistic graphics.

tall green grass covering the open field
tall green grass covering the open field

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view from horseback riding through a dark grassy field at night. The rider holds a torch that illuminates the narrow dirt path ahead, with the horse's ears visible in the foreground. The surroundings are open grassland under a clear night sky with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with dirt road and distant standing stones

events.description: ancient standing stones become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the dirt path through the open field, approaching distant stone formations

entered.detail: tall stone monoliths standing in the field ahead

segments.scene_description: The rider continues along the dirt path which widens slightly as it cuts through the open grassland. Ancient standing stones become visible in the distance, silhouetted against the night sky. The torchlight flickers as the horse maintains a steady pace through the empty field.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland with standing stones near path intersection

events.description: another rider holding a torch appears and passes by on the right side of the path
rider turns left off the dirt path into the grassy field toward the standing stones

agents.ego_description: turning off the path and riding through the grass toward the standing stones, raising the torch to survey the area

notable_agents.action: torch-bearing rider walking along the path in the opposite direction, passing by the ego

segments.scene_description: As the rider continues, another traveler with a torch appears walking in the opposite direction and passes by on the right. Shortly after, the rider turns left off the dirt path into the tall grass, approaching the ancient standing stones while raising the torch higher to illuminate the mysterious stone formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey on horseback through a dark, open grassland that leads toward a mysterious cluster of ancient monoliths. It begins with the rider moving along a narrow dirt path, the horse's ears visible in the foreground as a handheld torch casts a flickering glow over the surrounding grass. As the path widens, the silhouette of standing stones emerges in the distance against a clear night sky. The scene then shifts as another torch-bearing traveler passes by on the right, prompting the rider to turn left off the trail and into the tall grass. Finally, the camera approaches the ancient stone formations, raising the torch higher to illuminate the mysterious structures.
